tasks.subject: Task 0: Config + data fields + validation
tasks.description:
Add SHEET_ENDPOINT config (config.js), Phase-2 data fields (data.json meta.phase=2 + phase2Deadline; players bracket/q4/q5/p2), and extend validate-data.mjs (pure validate() export) with tests.

```json:metadata
{"files":["config.js","data.json","scripts/validate-data.mjs","test/validate.test.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"node scripts/validate-data.mjs && node --test test/","acceptanceCriteria":["config.js exports SHEET_ENDPOINT=''","meta.phase=2 + valid phase2Deadline","validator accepts optional bracket/q4/q5/p2 and rejects malformed","tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Bracket derivation in compute.js
tasks.description:
Add pure seedTeams/seedIndex/r32Pairings/regions to compute.js (mirrors prototype 257-267) with node:test coverage.

```json:metadata
{"files":["compute.js","test/compute.test.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"node --test test/compute.test.mjs","acceptanceCriteria":["seedTeams returns 32 [12 winners,12 runners,8 thirds]","r32Pairings 1-v-32","regions 8x [2j,2j+1]","seedIndex maps code->pos"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Bracket aggregation in compute.js
tasks.description:
Add aggregateBrackets(players,r32,regs) -> per-team R32 counts + R16 podium counts with backer names.

```json:metadata
{"files":["compute.js","test/compute.test.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"node --test test/compute.test.mjs","acceptanceCriteria":["aggregateBrackets returns r32/r16 count+backers","players without bracket contribute nothing"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Standings phase modes in compute.js
tasks.description:
buildStandings(players,proj,prevRanks,mode='p1') adds p1/p2/total and ranks by selectable mode.

```json:metadata
{"files":["compute.js","test/compute.test.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"node --test test/compute.test.mjs","acceptanceCriteria":["p1=q+g+b,p2=player.p2,total=p1+p2","sort by mode then total,q,name","default p1 preserves behavior"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: App shell — 6-tab nav + standings control
tasks.description:

{"files":["app.js","index.html"],"verifyCommand":"node --test test/","acceptanceCriteria":["NAV 6 tabs correct ids/icons","state has standMode/matchSub/zoom/build state","standings 3-segment control re-ranks","tab switch closes overlay","header pill PHASE 2 PICKS OPEN"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Build tab — interactive bracket (build.js)

{"files":["build.js","app.js","test/build.test.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"node --test test/build.test.mjs","acceptanceCriteria":["8 regions, R32 pick highlights/dims","R16 auto-populates from R32","invalid R32 change clears R16","locked makes inert","status banner + count/24"]}
```
